name: Chocolate Fudge
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces semisweet chocolate chips, melted see note
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9-inch square pan with foil extending over the sides of the pan; butter the foil.
2. In a saucepan, combine sugar, margarine, and milk. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly.
3. Boil for 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
4. Remove from heat. Add marshmallow cream and chocolate chips; blend until smooth.
5. Stir in walnuts and vanilla.
6. Pour into prepared pan.
7. Cool to room temperature.
8. Score into squares.
